sounds.name: elevator
sounds.description: Lo-fi warmth. The default. Like being on hold with the future.

sounds.name: typewriter
sounds.description: Mechanical keystrokes over a warm pad. For the nostalgia of physical input.

sounds.name: ambient
sounds.description: Soft textures and gentle drones. The outside world, piped in.

sounds.name: retro
sounds.description: Chiptune arpeggios. Reward your agent with the Music Dance Experience.

sounds.name: minimal
sounds.description: A deep hum. Almost nothing. For those who prefer quiet contemplation.

sounds.name: spotify
sounds.description: Controls your Spotify playback volume. Music fades in when coding starts, fades out when done.
